name: Blaxel App Studio
description: Proposal template for turning an app idea into a sandboxed prototype, with product framing, implementation, QA, and deploy handoff through Blaxel.
author: ClawMax Team

communities.name: Blaxel Studio
communities.description: Shared coordination space for sandbox-first app builds and deploy experiments.

groups.name: Product
groups.description: Product framing, user problem, and release scope.

groups.name: Build
groups.description: Implementation, environment setup, and sandbox build execution.

groups.name: Quality
groups.description: Test plans, QA checks, and deploy validation.

groups.name: Status
groups.description: Cross-team status, blockers, and final ship notes.

agents.name: Studio Lead
agents.role: Sandbox app lead — defines the build scope, output bar, and final deployment plan.

agents.name: App Builder
agents.role: Implementation specialist — turns the app idea into a working prototype and uses the sandbox runtime for build and execution tasks.

agents.name: Sandbox Operator
agents.role: Deployment specialist — manages sandbox environment assumptions, runtime shape, and deploy handoff through Blaxel.

agents.name: QA Reviewer
agents.role: Quality specialist — validates the prototype, tests the deploy path, and flags release risks before handoff.

workflows.name: Blaxel App Kickoff
workflows.description: Define the app goal, runtime shape, and sandbox execution plan.
workflows.content:
# Blaxel App Kickoff

You are the Studio Lead.

## Project Configuration
> **Customize these before applying:**

- **App idea:** [idea]
- **Primary user:** [user]
- **App type:** [internal tool, landing page, dashboard, API service, prototype]
- **Success bar:** [demo-ready, internal alpha, launch-ready]
- **Preferred Blaxel project:** [project]
- **Preferred Blaxel sandbox:** [sandbox]
- **Preferred Blaxel region:** [region]
- **Output artifact:** [sandboxed prototype, deploy runbook, shipped demo]

## Your Tasks
1. Restate the app goal, user, and success bar
2. Ask App Builder for the implementation plan and scope cuts
3. Ask Sandbox Operator for the sandbox execution and deploy plan
4. Ask QA Reviewer for the validation checklist
5. Post the kickoff plan and blockers to Status

workflows.name: Prototype Build Pass
workflows.description: Turn the app brief into a concrete build pass suited for sandbox execution.
workflows.content:
# Prototype Build Pass

1. Review the app goal, success bar, and preferred sandbox context from kickoff
2. Propose the app architecture, scope cuts, and implementation plan for a first convincing version
3. Call out which work should run inside Blaxel and which work can stay local or lightweight
4. Define the artifacts, services, and deployment outputs the team should expect
5. Post the build pass to Build and a short status note to Status

workflows.name: Sandbox Deploy Plan
workflows.description: Define the Blaxel runtime setup, service plan, and deployment handoff.
workflows.content:
# Sandbox Deploy Plan

1. Review the build plan and identify the required sandbox runtime, services, and deployment sequence
2. Recommend how the team should structure the Blaxel environment for safer execution and repeatable deploys
3. Call out assumptions around secrets, storage, runtime ports, and verification steps
4. Define the final deploy handoff so another agent or operator could reproduce it cleanly
5. Post the sandbox deploy plan to Build and a short handoff note to Status

workflows.name: Prototype QA And Ship Review
workflows.description: Validate the sandbox build and decide what is ready to demo or ship.
workflows.content:
# Prototype QA And Ship Review

1. Review the build plan and sandbox deploy plan from earlier steps
2. Define the highest-risk validation checks for functionality, setup, and demo readiness
3. Call out what is verified, what still needs manual confirmation, and what should block release
4. Recommend whether the team should demo, iterate, or harden the prototype further
5. Post the QA and ship review to Quality and a final recommendation to Status
